inputs.label: Average Inventory
inputs.businessContext: The average value of inventory over a period.

businessContext_i18n.en: The average value of inventory over a period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Belirli bir dönemdeki envanterin ortalama değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der durchschnittliche Lagerwert über einen Zeitraum.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur moyenne du stock sur une période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor promedio del inventario durante un período.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط قيمة المخزون خلال فترة زمنية.

inputs.label: Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)
inputs.businessContext: Direct cost of producing goods sold.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct cost of producing goods sold.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût direct de production des biens vendus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo directo de producir los bienes vendidos.

label_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Forderungen aus Lieferungen und Leistungen

businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşteriler tarafından borçlu olunan ortalama tutar.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant moyen dû par les clients.
businessContext_i18n.es: Monto promedio adeudado por los clientes.

inputs.label: Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total sales revenue for the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total sales revenue for the period.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu total des ventes pour la période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingresos totales por ventas del período.

label_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Verbindlichkeiten aus Lieferungen und Leistungen

inputs.label: Days in Period
inputs.businessContext: Number of days in the measurement period (typically 365 for annual).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days in the measurement period (typically 365 for annual).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçüm dönemindeki gün sayısı (genellikle yıllık için 365).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Tage im Messzeitraum (typischerweise 365 für jährlich).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de jours dans la période de mesure (généralement 365 pour une année).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de días en el período de medición (generalmente 365 para anual).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد الأيام في فترة القياس (عادة 365 للسنة).

formulas.cashConversionCycle: (averageInventory / cogs * daysInPeriod) + (averageReceivables / revenue * daysInPeriod) - (averagePayables / cogs * daysInPeriod)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
